packages.name: nelexa/zip

suggest.ext-iconv: Needed to support convert zip entry name to requested character encoding
suggest.ext-openssl: Needed to support encrypt zip entries or use ext-mcrypt

packages.description: PhpZip is a php-library for extended work with ZIP-archives. Open, create, update, delete, extract and get info tool. Supports appending to existing ZIP files, WinZip AES encryption, Traditional PKWARE Encryption, BZIP2 compression, external file attributes and ZIP64 extensions. Alternative ZipArchive. It does not require php-zip extension.
